switch_tip: When enabled, the official account shows custom menu; when disabled, followers won't see the menu.
alert_message: After enabling, users will reply with specified content after following the official account.
alert_highlight: This feature only supports verified official accounts/service accounts
empty_sub: Please go to System Settings > Official Account Management to bind an official account
modal_confirm_close: After disabling, this feature will be closed by default and no longer supported. All official account menus will be deactivated. Confirm to close?
